note: Curated index of Tektronix instructional videos. Reference material — fetch the url for full video + any available transcript. Phase 0 pilot seeded with MSO2 only; sweep other families once the retrieval path is proven. Transcripts are NOT yet populated — transcript_chunks[] is reserved for future Phase 1 work (YouTube auto-captions or Whisper pass).
updateProcedure: Run scripts/scrapeTekVideos.ts to collect URLs per family; fetch page metadata for summary/duration; optionally fetch YouTube transcripts. Bump lastUpdated. Sync via the normal V2 → Public → mcp-server flow.

videos.title: 2 Series MSO Mixed Signal Oscilloscope Introduction
videos.summary: Short introduction covering the key features and specifications of the 2 Series MSO. A starting point for getting oriented on the instrument.

videos.title: 2 Series MSO — A Full Set of Analysis Tools
videos.summary: Overview of the analysis tool set on the 2 Series MSO — measurements, math, cursors, decoding, and related capabilities.

videos.title: Making Measurements on the 2 Series MSO
videos.summary: Walks through three common measurement techniques on the 2 Series MSO: manual on-screen observation, cursor placement, and automated measurements. Start here when teaching someone how to pull numbers off a signal.

videos.title: 2 Series MSO — Cursors and Measurements
videos.summary: Dedicated tutorial on the 2 Series MSO's cursor and automated measurement workflow — setup, placement, readout interpretation.
